title: China’s Moonshot trained its AI model on a restricted Nvidia chip, White House claims.
summary: Michael Kratsios, the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy director, writes on X that Moonshot accessed Nvidia’s high-end GB300 processors in Thailand, which are subject to strict export controls.
caption: output/2026-07-22/china-s-moonshot-trained-its-ai-model-on-a-restricted-nvidia-chip-whit.txt
